source_pr.title: telemetry: set switch default to false
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and 
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: close #41335 

Problem Summary: Disable Telemetry report by default.

### What is changed and how it works?

Changed the switch default of `EnableTelemetry` from `true` to `false`.

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [x] Unit test
- [ ] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [ ] No code

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [x] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note
Disable telemetry report by default.
```

symptoms: No concrete flaky failure signature: this PR changes the default value of telemetry enablement and updates unit tests accordingly.
failure_signature: N/A (configuration default change + test updates; no linked flaky signature)
root_cause_explanation: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE: The patch changes the default telemetry switch (EnableTelemetry true→false) and adjusts related unit tests and dependencies. It does not contain a deterministic-stabilization change tied to a flaky failure signature; treat this as a non-flaky refactor/behavior change rather than a root-cause fix for flakiness.
fix_pattern: Change telemetry default to disabled and update tests/expectations; not a targeted flaky stabilization fix.

evidence: files: config/config.go, config/config.toml.example, config/config_test.go, privilege/privileges/privileges_test.go, sessionctx/variable/tidb_vars.go, telemetry/cte_test/BUILD.bazel, telemetry/cte_test/cte_test.go, telemetry/telemetry_test.go
